arts.ttl: Douglas Luiz’s controversial punch on Patric: Referee oversight and potential consequences ahead of Inter-Juventus clash
arts.sum: In the 83rd minute of a tense 0-0 match between Juventus and Lazio, a controversial incident involving Douglas Luiz and Patric went unnoticed by match officials. The Brazilian midfielder appeared to strike Patric with either a punch or an elbow, an action that many believe warranted a red card for violent conduct. Calciomercato report how Referee Sacchi missed the incident, and surprisingly, VAR official Di Paolo did not intervene. This oversight has raised questions about the effectiveness and consistency of VAR implementation in Serie A. arts.ttl: Serie A | Roma v Inter: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: The eighth round of Serie A resumes with a bang as Roma hosts Inter in a highly anticipated match. Both teams are looking to make a statement after the international break. Roma remains unbeaten under new manager Ivan Juric but are coming off a controversial draw with Monza where they were denied a late penalty. Inter, on the other hand, secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over Torino in their last outing thanks to a Marcus Thuram hat-trick. arts.ttl: Walter Sabatini launches scathing attack on Roma’s American owners
arts.sum: Walter Sabatini, former Roma executive and currently without a role after leaving Salernitana, has launched a blistering attack on the American ownership of AS Roma in a recent interview with Corriere della Sera. Sabatini did not mince words in his criticism: “These Americans at Roma are charlatans, people who have not understood the city and the sense of ownership that the people have towards the team.” The experienced sports director expressed deep concern about how the Friedkin Group is managing a historic club like Roma, whose fans have an immense passion and, in his view, do not deserve to be The post Walter Sabatini launches scathing attack on Roma’s American owners appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A Liveblog inc Roma-Inter, Empoli-Napoli, Venezia-Atalanta
Serie A: Roma vs Inter – probable line-ups and where to watch on TV
arts.sum: It’s an Argentinean derby between Roma and Inter as Paulo Dybala and Lautaro Martinez lead...

Since 2021 Roma have lost six of their eight Serie A matches against Inter (W1 D1); in this period, the Nerazzurri have won the most games against the Giallorossi in the competition. Roma have scored in each of their last 24 home Serie A games; the Giallorossi could register a longer streak in home matches for the first time since the period between December 2015 and September 2017 (34 in that case).

arts.ttl: How Inter Will Line Up Against Roma After Crucial Injury Boost
arts.sum: There's a heavyweight clash awaiting defending Serie A champions Inter later this evening as they head to the Stadio Olimpico to meet Roma. With Napoli already two points clear and Juventus narrowly edging Lazio last night, Simone Inzaghi's men have little margin for error to keep up with the pace. arts.ttl: Juric: “Inter are without weaknesses, Dovbyk has recovered”
arts.sum: Roma manager Ivan Juric held a press conference ahead of his team’s upcoming match against Inter Milan, addressing various topics including player fitness and tactical considerations. Regarding key players Paulo Dybala and Artem Dovbyk, Juric provided positive updates: “Artem returned with a small discomfort but has recovered. Paulo has gone through a recovery phase and has now had four great training sessions. He will be managed based on how the match goes, but they are both doing well.” Juric acknowledged the challenge of facing Inter, stating, “We know everything about Inter.
